statements.statement: What is the chemical symbol of [QUESTION]?
Quel est le symbole chimique du [QUESTION]?
Was ist das chemische Symbol für [QUESTION]?

questions.question: elementLabel
questions.sparqlQuery:
select distinct ?element ?[QUESTION] ?[ANSWER] where {
  ?element wdt:P31 wd:Q11344 .
  ?element wdt:P246 ?[ANSWER] .
  ?element rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {?element wdt:P31 wd:Q1299291} .
  FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])="[LANGUAGE]")
  }
